name: Construct Mapping review for Operational Practice and Policy Boundary Update bundle
summary: Accepted. The artifacts distinguish response origin, scoring-rule labels, generated target score levels, human labels, and real-response comparators. The claim updates explicitly separate simulated-response QA/test suites from GPT-generated training augmentation and scorer validation.

findings.claim_or_issue: The bundle treats simulated machine-scoring QA cases as scoring-rule test cases, not as independently labeled student responses for scorer validation.
findings.why_it_matters: Conflating rule-QA cases with validated student-response labels would overstate the acceptable-use claim.
findings.recommended_action: Retain the staged artifact fields that separate response origin, label source, scorer use, and real-response comparator.
